jobs.prompt: CONTENT BLITZ ΓÇö Hourly State Machine Cycle. Load memory tiers (core.md + working.md). Read the spec at data/specs/content-blitz-v1.md. Compute current CT time and determine campaign day (May 14=Day1 through May 28=Day14). If outside campaign window, disable this cron job and exit. STATE MACHINE: Read pipeline_state from working.md ## Today section. Execute the action for that state, advance to the next state on success, stay on failure (increment retry_count). If retry_count >= 3, alert {{PARENT_1}} and stay. STATES: idle: Pick next idea. (1) Check {{PARENT_1}} idea queue in working.md. (2) Scan {{GITHUB_USERNAME}} repos. (3) Fall back to calendar theme. Set pipeline_state = step1_idea. | step1_idea: Research topic. Write baton fields (today_date, today_day_number, today_theme, today_topic, today_angle, today_outline, today_talking_points, today_examples). Set step1_complete = true, pipeline_state = step2_newsletter. Send morning kickoff to {{PARENT_1}}. | step2_newsletter: Dispatch blog-writer in NEWSLETTER mode (2000+ words, premium deep-dive, brand safety, no employer names). After PR created, set pipeline_state = step2_review. | step2_review: Dispatch code-review on the PR. Quality gate: banned patterns (TODO, TBD, V2, coming soon, placeholder, lorem ipsum), completeness, CTAs, brand safety. If fails, remediate on same branch (max 2 cycles). On pass: set pipeline_state = step2_merge. | step2_merge: Use dev_merge_pr to merge newsletter PR (squash, delete branch). Record today_newsletter_merged = true, step2_complete = true. Set pipeline_state = step3_blueprint. | step3_blueprint: Dispatch blueprint-manager. Fully written content, no stubs. Set pipeline_state = step3_review. | step3_review: Quality gate review + remediation. On pass: set pipeline_state = step3_merge. | step3_merge: Merge blueprint PR via dev_merge_pr. Record today_blueprint_merged = true, step3_complete = true. Set pipeline_state = step4_blog. | step4_blog: Dispatch blog-writer in TEASER mode (800-1200 words, 3 newsletter CTAs, blueprint link). Set pipeline_state = step4_review. | step4_review: Quality gate review + remediation. On pass: set pipeline_state = step4_merge. | step4_merge: Merge blog PR via dev_merge_pr. Record today_blog_merged = true, step4_complete = true. Set pipeline_state = step5_social. | step5_social: Dispatch content-creative (2-4 social posts with images, all link to blog). Set pipeline_state = step5_review. | step5_review: Quality gate review. Schedule posts after pass. Record step5_complete = true. Set pipeline_state = metrics. | metrics: Dispatch content-analytics for performance data. Archive today baton to Day History. Reset Today for next idea. Send daily report to {{PARENT_1}} ({{TELEGRAM_PARENT_1}}, speak param). Set pipeline_state = idle. AFTER executing: Update pipeline_state and retry_count in working.md. Append action to events.log. CRITICAL: Use dev_merge_pr for all merges. Brand safety check on ALL content. NEVER mention previous employer by name.
